name: fleet-feedback-submit
description: Submit fleet feedback to the golden-path upstream repository. Supports 5 feedback types: feature-request, bug-report, policy-exception, improvement-share, pain-point. Accepts feedback from all environments (production, staging, development, local). See ADR-022.

args.type: Feedback type (feature-request, bug-report, policy-exception, improvement-share, pain-point)
args.title: Short descriptive title for the feedback
args.environment: Source environment (production, staging, development, local, unknown). Auto-detected from NODE_ENV if omitted.

steps.description: Preview the feedback payload without submitting (dry run). Environment defaults to unknown if not set.
Submit the feedback to the upstream golden-path repository

steps.command: echo 'Verify the upstream issue was created at the URL shown above'
steps.description: Check the upstream repo for the created issue and track its triage status
